x-enumeration-literals.name: Network Gateway
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A network gateway is a device or node that connects disparate networks by translating communications from one protocol to another.
https://www.cisco.com/c/en/us/products/routers/what-is-a-network-gateway.html

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Gateway
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A System that supports the connection to 
financial networks that support interbank and financial institution connectivity.
 
This includes SWIFT, ACH gateways, and market regulatory reporting connections.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Operational Gateway
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Gateway to exchange information with external parties for non-financial messages/transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: eCommerce Gateway
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A system for processing of e-commerce transactions for authentication, authorization and capture of the financial transactions.

An ecommerce payment gateway is a service that authorizes credit card payments and processes them securely with a users merchant account.
